en_title: Supergirl Sets Digital Release Date After Disappointing Run in Theaters
cn_title: 《超级少女》院线失利后定档7月28日上线数字平台
subtitle: 票房表现惨淡

paragraphs.en: Supergirl debuts in North America on Digital on July 28, after a disappointing run in theaters that saw just $121 million made at the global box office.
paragraphs.cn: 《超级少女》院线表现令人失望，全球票房仅1.21亿美元(约合人民币8亿元)，影片将于7月28日在北美上线数字平台。

paragraphs.en: On July 28, Supergirl will be available at home on participating digital platforms, including Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV, Fandango, and more. The DC Universe movie then launches on 4K UHD, Blu-ray, and DVD on September 8.
paragraphs.cn: 7月28日起，观众可通过Amazon Prime Video、Apple TV、Fandango等参与发行的数字平台在家观看《超级少女》。这部DC宇宙电影随后将于9月8日发行4K超高清、蓝光和DVD版本。

paragraphs.en: Supergirl, which stars Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El, followed last year’s DCU kickstarter Superman, but failed to generate anywhere near as much interest from cinemagoers. It was deemed a box office bomb when it debuted to a global total of $68 million following its June 26 premiere. The Warner Bros. superhero movie reportedly had a $170 million production budget and $120 million marketing budget, suggesting the studio would need around $300 million just to break even. Supergirl didn’t come close to that milestone.
paragraphs.cn: 《超级少女》由Milly Alcock同时饰演超级少女与Kara Zor-El，接续去年为DCU揭幕的《超人》，但远未引起同等程度的观众兴趣。影片6月26日上映后，首轮全球票房仅6800万美元(约合人民币5亿元)，被视为票房炸弹。据报道，这部华纳兄弟超级英雄电影制作预算为1.7亿美元(约合人民币12亿元)，营销预算为1.2亿美元(约合人民币8亿元)，意味着票房约需达到3亿美元(约合人民币20亿元)才能回本，而《超级少女》远未触及这一门槛。

paragraphs.en: "While Supergirl didn’t meet our box office expectations," DC Studios co-CEO Peter Safran told The New York Times following Supergirl's opening weekend, "it’s just one component of a broader, long-term strategy at DC Studios that we remain confident in."
paragraphs.cn: 《超级少女》首周末过后，DC影业联合首席执行官Peter Safran告诉《纽约时报》：「尽管《超级少女》没有达到我们的票房预期，但它只是DC影业更广泛长期战略的一部分，我们对这项战略依然有信心。」

paragraphs.en: To that end, Lanterns is set to premiere on HBO Max in August, Clayface comes out in October, then Superman follow-up Man of Tomorrow hits theaters in 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 按照这项规划，《绿灯军团》将于8月在HBO Max首播，《泥脸》10月上映，随后《超人》续作《明日之子》将在2027年登陆院线。

paragraphs.en: Alcock will play a significant role in Man of Tomorrow and beyond, DC Studios has said. Supergirl takes place after the events of Superman and sees her encounter other galactic characters like Lobo, played by Jason Momoa. As for Man of Tomorrow, all we really know about the movie is that Superman and supervillain Lex Luthor have to work together to combat the threat of Brainiac. But we can also expect to see the main cast from Superman return. With Supergirl’s involvement, could we see the Justice League finally take shape?
paragraphs.cn: DC影业表示，Alcock将在《明日之子》及后续作品中扮演重要角色。《超级少女》的故事发生在《超人》之后，她会遇到Jason Momoa饰演的Lobo等宇宙角色。至于《明日之子》，目前只知道超人和超级反派Lex Luthor必须联手对抗Brainiac的威胁，《超人》的主要演员阵容预计也会回归。随着超级少女加入，正义联盟是否终于要成形了？

paragraphs.en: For more, you can check out IGN's 6/10 Supergirl review . You can also read about some behind-the-scenes details that suggest creative differences between DC Studios co-CEO James Gunn and director Craig Gillespie impacted the final product .
paragraphs.cn: 想了解更多，可以查看IGN为《超级少女》给出的6/10评测，也可以阅读幕后细节：这些信息表明，DC影业联合首席执行官James Gunn与导演Craig Gillespie之间的创作分歧影响了最终成片。

paragraphs.en: Supergirl Digital, 4K UHD, and Blu-ray contain over 90 minutes of bonus features including the following:
paragraphs.cn: 《超级少女》数字版、4K超高清版和蓝光版将收录超过90分钟的花絮内容，包括以下项目：

summary: 《超级少女》全球票房仅1.21亿美元(约合人民币8亿元)，远低于约3亿美元(约合人民币20亿元)的回本门槛。影片将于7月28日上线数字平台，9月8日发行4K超高清、蓝光和DVD版本。
opus_summary: 《超级少女》院线表现惨淡，但DC影业仍强调长期战略不变。影片本月底转入数字发行，后续还将通过《绿灯军团》《泥脸》和《明日之子》继续推进DC宇宙。
